settings_subtitle: Poll current WAN down/upload via TR-064 and keep a local history.
enabled_hint: Requires TR-064 ("Access for Applications") to be enabled on the FRITZ!Box.
host_hint: Hostname or IP of the FRITZ!Box, e.g. fritz.box or 192.168.178.1.
use_tls_hint: Enable if TR-064 is exposed over HTTPS (port 49443).
password_hint: Stored encrypted in the DOCSight configuration.
interval_hint: How often a bandwidth sample is taken. Minimum 10 s.
history_days_hint: Samples older than this are removed automatically.
no_history: No history yet — samples appear once the collector has been running.
